creator: joonas115@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 246644
this patch updates the net/sacc port to 1.07

net/sacc port is out of date. Sacc version 1.07 has been released. Currently, net/sacc doesn't have a maintainer and I can't adopt the port, unfortunately. But I have a patch attached to this bug report. You can apply it with git apply. This is my first time contributing to ports and I'm very new to FreeBSD overall, so there might be some mistakes.
